task_updates.executor_notes: Added resident hook kwargs to run_turn: triggered_by_message_ids, recovered_input_messages, on_turn_start, and mid_turn_message_check. When trigger IDs are supplied, run_turn skips inline inbound message creation and passes those IDs to create_turn. Recovered messages are sorted by sent_at to build the initial user prompt. on_turn_start is invoked synchronously immediately after create_turn and before the first model call. mid_turn_message_check is invoked before final-text auto-send and before executing explicit send_message tool calls; returned fresh messages are appended as a mid-turn user block, trigger IDs are widened via update_turn, and the model loop is re-entered. Verification: new tests/test_run_turn_hooks.py covers recovered ordering, trigger ID passthrough, on_turn_start timing, final-text mid-turn re-prompt, and explicit-send_message mid-turn re-prompt. Existing invocation-mode tests/test_run_turn.py, tests/test_cli.py, and tests/test_envelope.py passed unchanged. Full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 28 tests. Source-tree leaked-prefix grep returned zero matches.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. With new kwargs omitted, tests/test_run_turn.py, tests/test_cli.py, and tests/test_envelope.py pass unchanged. With kwargs supplied, tests verify on_turn_start fires after create_turn and before the first model call, and mid_turn_message_check fires/re-prompts at both the final-text checkpoint and the explicit-send_message checkpoint.
